name: Tomato and Fennel Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 large fennel bulb, core removed and thinly sliced
4 medium tomatoes, cut into wedges and seeded
2 tablespoons fennel fronds or cilantro, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the thinly sliced fennel and wedged tomatoes in a bowl.
2. Mix together 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard, 3 tablespoons red wine vinegar, and 3/4 cup olive oil.
3. Season the dressing to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Pour the dressing over the fennel and tomatoes.
5. Sprinkle the chopped fennel fronds or cilantro on top.
